rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION FOR RESTITUTION DENIED. (302/AJR/MD)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW WARRI et al VS. CAREY LIMOUSINE OF S.F., INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER TO 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION BY CAREY OVERRULED. AGREEMENT CONTAINS STATEMENT THAT OPERATORS ARE INDEPENDENT CONTRACTORS WHICH IS ADEQUATE. DEMURRER TO 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAIN. NO ALLEGATION OF ENTRY INTO CONTRACT WITH INTENTION NOT TO PERFORM. 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAIN. NO ADEQUATE ALLEGATIONS OF FAILURE TO DISCLOSE MATERIAL AGREEMENT. (302/AJR/RS)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW WARRI et al VS. CAREY LIMOUSINE OF S.F., INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Strike
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO STRIKE MOOT. (302/AJR/RS)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW WARRI et al VS. CAREY LIMOUSINE OF S.F., INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER OF CLI FLEET AS TO 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD SUSTAINED. NO ADEQUATE ALLEGATIONS AS TO CAUSATION AND DAMAGES. IN ADDITION, ALLEGATION OF FRAUD/DECEIT DEFICIENT. NO ALLEGATION OF DIRECT MISREPRESENTATION AND NO ALLEGATION OF CONCEALMENT BECAUSE NO ALLEGATION OF DUTY TO DISCLOSE ANY ARRANGEMENT BETWEEN CLI FLEET AND CAREY. 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION UNFAIR COMPETITION SUSTAIN. NO UNFAIR COMPETITION BECAUSE 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION FAILS. (302/AJR/RS)

rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER TO 3RD AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. (302/AJR/AA)

rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO DUTY TO CONTROL PUBLICATION OF ARTICLE BY ENTITY FUNDED BY PUBLIC. (302/AJR/AA)

rulings.Case Title: AMAR SEKHON et al VS. MEENA RAMBARAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION CONSTRUCTIVE FRAUD AND DEMURRER TO 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION MONEY HAD AND RECEIVED SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION. 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION CONVERSION SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEMURRER TO 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION UNJUST ENRICHMENT SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND OTHERWISE DEMURRER OVERRULED. (302/AJR/AA)

rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION TO TAX COSTS. NO SHOWING WORK OF PARALEGAL UNNCESSARY TO PREPARE RECORD. NO ITEMIZATION OF WORK BY PARALEGAL. (302/AJR/PB)

rulings.Case Title: BUENA VISTA PARK, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. ANDREW KOJESKI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER OVERRULED. ATTACHMENT OF NOTICE OF INTENT TO WITHDRAW AS EXHIBIT TO NOTICE OF TERMINATION FILED WITH RENT BOARD DOES NOT CAUSE DEFFECT. COMPLAINT NOT UNCERTAIN BY REASON OF LANGUAGE THAT OCCUPYING UNDER MONTH TO MONTH TENANCY WHEN ALLEGATION OF COMPLAINT AS WHOLE MAKES CLEAR TENANCY TERMINATED. (302/AJR/RS)
